room.name: York Road Station
room.description: You stand on the deserted platform at York Road. The station hasn't been used for over 50 years, faded pre-war posters advertise soap powder and gin of unfamiliar brands. The tiled walls echo faintly.

room.name: Holborn Underground Station.
room.description: A dusty platform stretches into the darkness. The service lights flicker. The posters here are newer, from the 50s approximately.

room.name: a Service Tunnel Junction
room.description: A dimly lit junction deep beneath the city. Pipes rattle and water drips from the ceiling.

room.name: a Maintenance Room
room.description: A cramped room filled with valves, toolboxes, and a humming electrical cabinet.

room.name: Leicester Square Underground Station
room.description: The tunnel opens into a larger underground hall plastered with faded posters.

room.name: Piccadilly Circus Underground Station
room.description: A dusty platform stretches into the darkness. The service lights flicker. The posters here are newer, from the 50s approximately.

room.name: Green Park Underground Station.
room.description: A dusty platform stretches into the darkness. The service lights flicker. The posters here are newer, from the 50s approximately.

room.name: beneath a service grate.
room.description: A dusty platform stretches into the darkness. The service lights flicker. The posters here are newer, from the 50s it appears.
